Advanced Momentum Analyzer

OBV + Sortino + Slope Acceleration | 1401 assets | 2026-03-05  |  market-dashboards
Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-05 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Analyzes 700+ assets using OBV divergence detection, Sortino ratios, slope acceleration, and trajectory classification. Produces signals from STRONG_BUY to SELL with confidence scores. OBV divergence flags price-volume disagreements as early warning signals.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum dashboard shows a market heavily tilted toward caution, with 626 assets on HOLD representing nearly 63% of the 700+ analyzed. However, the system has identified 268 STRONG_BUY signals, indicating pockets of concentrated opportunity primarily among assets displaying V-shaped recovery patterns. The top 10 buys are dominated by this V-shaped trajectory, with nine assets (AGI, AG, AEM, AFK, AEIS, AEP, AIRR, ACMR, AIA) all rated STRONG_BUY at 90% confidence and one (AES) at 75% confidence, suggesting a synchronized recovery pattern across a diverse sector grouping. Notably, SELL signals outnumber BUY signals by a factor of 10 to 1 (403 versus 38), indicating the dashboard is detecting significant price-volume divergences and momentum decay in the broader market. This divergence between cautious holdings, strong recovery signals in select names, and widespread sell pressures suggests a market in transition with clear winners and losers rather than broad-based movement.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
